name: Energy Services of America CORP
summary: Energy Services of America Corporation, formed in 2006, is a contractor and service company operating primarily in the mid-Atlantic and central United States. It provides construction, replacement, and repair services for natural gas pipelines, storage facilities, water distribution systems, and electrical/mechanical installations. The company serves natural gas, petroleum, water distribution, automotive, chemical, and power industries, reporting $411.0 million in consolidated operating revenues for fiscal year ended September 30, 2025.

products.name: Natural Gas Pipeline Construction
products.description: Construction, replacement, and repair of natural gas pipelines and storage facilities for utility and private companies.

products.name: Electrical and Mechanical Services
products.description: Full range of electrical and mechanical installations and repairs including substation, switchyard, and pipe fabrication services.

products.name: Water and Sewer Pipeline Installation
products.description: Installation of water and sewer pipelines including water distribution and wastewater systems for municipalities.

products.name: Corrosion Protection Services
products.description: Cathodic protection and corrosion prevention services for pipelines.

products.name: Horizontal Drilling Services
products.description: Directional and horizontal drilling services for pipeline and broadband infrastructure.

products.name: HVAC/R and Fire Protection Services
products.description: HVAC/R, controls, and fire protection services for automotive, chemical, and power facilities.

products.name: Building and Civil Construction
products.description: Construction and renovation of school, government, commercial buildings, and small bridge projects.

products.name: Broadband and Solar Installation
products.description: Installation of broadband systems and solar electric systems.

products.name: Utility Paving Services
products.description: Utility paving services for water distribution customers in West Virginia, Kentucky, and Tennessee markets.
